summary: Backend testing for Regime Performance Tracking feature. All 26 tests passed (10 unit tests + 16 API tests). Verified RegimePerformanceService correctly logs trades to MongoDB, trading bot's _log_trade_to_regime_performance method works, and all API endpoints return success with correct structure.

UNIT_TESTS.details: RegimePerformanceService initialization, trade logging (wins/losses), R-multiple calculation, regime summary, strategy performance queries

features_verified.service_initialization: PASS - RegimePerformanceService initializes with MongoDB and creates indexes
features_verified.log_trade_winning: PASS - Winning trades logged with is_winner=True
features_verified.log_trade_losing: PASS - Losing trades logged with is_winner=False
features_verified.r_multiple_calculation: PASS - R-multiple calculated as realized_pnl / risk_amount
features_verified.regime_summary: PASS - Aggregates trade data by regime correctly
features_verified.strategy_regime_performance: PASS - Returns performance data filtered by strategy/regime
features_verified.best_strategies_for_regime: PASS - Returns sorted strategies for given regime
features_verified.api_strategies_endpoint: PASS - /api/regime-performance/strategies returns performance list with filters
features_verified.market_regime_current: PASS - /api/market-regime/current returns state=CONFIRMED_DOWN with signal blocks

critical_code_review_comments: Service wiring in server.py is correct (lines 431-436)
_log_trade_to_regime_performance method properly passes trade data to service

All required fields are included in trade logging: trade_id, setup_type, market_regime, direction, realized_pnl, shares, entry_price, exit_price, regime_score, regime_position_multiplier, risk_amount, closed_at
API endpoints have proper error handling (invalid regime returns 400)
seed_data_creation: None - tests use mock data or existing system data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 69 verified regime performance tracking feature. All 26 tests passed. Unit tests in test_regime_performance.py cover service logic with mocks. API tests in test_regime_performance_api.py cover all 5 regime-performance endpoints plus market-regime/current. The service is properly wired to trading bot - when trades close, _log_trade_to_regime_performance is called to log trade data with regime info to MongoDB.
